001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.SystemUtils.*;
023
024import java.io.*;
025import java.util.*;
026import java.util.concurrent.*;
027
028import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
034
035/**
036 * Serializes POJO models to XML.
037 *
038 * <h5 class='topic'>Media types</h5>
039 * <p>
040 * Handles <c>Accept</c> types:  <bc>text/xml</bc>
041 * <p>
042 * Produces <c>Content-Type</c> types:  <bc>text/xml</bc>
043 *
044 * <h5 class='topic'>Description</h5>
045 * <p>
046 * See the {@link JsonSerializer} class for details on how Java models map to JSON.
047 *
048 * <p>
049 * For example, the following JSON...
050 * <p class='bjson'>
051 *    {
052 *       name:<js>'John Smith'</js>,
053 *       address: {
054 *          streetAddress: <js>'21 2nd Street'</js>,
055 *          city: <js>'New York'</js>,
056 *          state: <js>'NY'</js>,
057 *          postalCode: <js>10021</js>
058 *       },
059 *       phoneNumbers: [
060 *          <js>'212 555-1111'</js>,
061 *          <js>'212 555-2222'</js>
062 *       ],
063 *       additionalInfo: <jk>null</jk>,
064 *       remote: <jk>false</jk>,
065 *       height: <js>62.4</js>,
066 *       <js>'fico score'</js>:  <js>' &gt; 640'</js>
067 *    }
068 * <p>
069 *    ...maps to the following XML using the default serializer...
070 * <p class='bxml'>
071 *    <xt>&lt;object&gt;</xt>
072 *       <xt>&lt;name&gt;</xt>John Smith<xt>&lt;/name&gt;</xt>
073 *       <xt>&lt;address&gt;</xt>
074 *          <xt>&lt;streetAddress&gt;</xt>21 2nd Street<xt>&lt;/streetAddress&gt;</xt>
075 *          <xt>&lt;city&gt;</xt>New York<xt>&lt;/city&gt;</xt>
076 *          <xt>&lt;state&gt;</xt>NY<xt>&lt;/state&gt;</xt>
077 *          <xt>&lt;postalCode&gt;</xt>10021<xt>&lt;/postalCode&gt;</xt>
078 *       <xt>&lt;/address&gt;</xt>
079 *       <xt>&lt;phoneNumbers&gt;</xt>
080 *          <xt>&lt;string&gt;</xt>212 555-1111<xt>&lt;/string&gt;</xt>
081 *          <xt>&lt;string&gt;</xt>212 555-2222<xt>&lt;/string&gt;</xt>
082 *       <xt>&lt;/phoneNumbers&gt;</xt>
083 *       <xt>&lt;additionalInfo</xt> <xa>_type</xa>=<xs>'null'</xs><xt>&gt;&lt;/additionalInfo&gt;</xt>
084 *       <xt>&lt;remote&gt;</xt>false<xt>&lt;/remote&gt;</xt>
085 *       <xt>&lt;height&gt;</xt>62.4<xt>&lt;/height&gt;</xt>
086 *       <xt>&lt;fico_x0020_score&gt;</xt> &amp;gt; 640<xt>&lt;/fico_x0020_score&gt;</xt>
087 *    <xt>&lt;/object&gt;</xt>
088 *
089 * <p>
090 * An additional "add-json-properties" mode is also provided to prevent loss of JSON data types...
091 * <p class='bxml'>
092 *    <xt>&lt;object&gt;</xt>
093 *       <xt>&lt;name</xt> <xa>_type</xa>=<xs>'string'</xs><xt>&gt;</xt>John Smith<xt>&lt;/name&gt;</xt>
094 *       <xt>&lt;address</xt> <xa>_type</xa>=<xs>'object'</xs><xt>&gt;</xt>
095 *          <xt>&lt;streetAddress</xt> <xa>_type</xa>=<xs>'string'</xs><xt>&gt;</xt>21 2nd Street<xt>&lt;/streetAddress&gt;</xt>
096 *          <xt>&lt;city</xt> <xa>_type</xa>=<xs>'string'</xs><xt>&gt;</xt>New York<xt>&lt;/city&gt;</xt>
097 *          <xt>&lt;state</xt> <xa>_type</xa>=<xs>'string'</xs><xt>&gt;</xt>NY<xt>&lt;/state&gt;</xt>
098 *          <xt>&lt;postalCode</xt> <xa>_type</xa>=<xs>'number'</xs><xt>&gt;</xt>10021<xt>&lt;/postalCode&gt;</xt>
099 *       <xt>&lt;/address&gt;</xt>
100 *       <xt>&lt;phoneNumbers</xt> <xa>_type</xa>=<xs>'array'</xs><xt>&gt;</xt>
101 *          <xt>&lt;string&gt;</xt>212 555-1111<xt>&lt;/string&gt;</xt>
102 *          <xt>&lt;string&gt;</xt>212 555-2222<xt>&lt;/string&gt;</xt>
103 *       <xt>&lt;/phoneNumbers&gt;</xt>
104 *       <xt>&lt;additionalInfo</xt> <xa>_type</xa>=<xs>'null'</xs><xt>&gt;&lt;/additionalInfo&gt;</xt>
105 *       <xt>&lt;remote</xt> <xa>_type</xa>=<xs>'boolean'</xs><xt>&gt;</xt>false<xt>&lt;/remote&gt;</xt>
106 *       <xt>&lt;height</xt> <xa>_type</xa>=<xs>'number'</xs><xt>&gt;</xt>62.4<xt>&lt;/height&gt;</xt>
107 *       <xt>&lt;fico_x0020_score</xt> <xa>_type</xa>=<xs>'string'</xs><xt>&gt;</xt> &amp;gt; 640<xt>&lt;/fico_x0020_score&gt;</xt>
108 *    <xt>&lt;/object&gt;</xt>
109 * </p>
110 *
111 * <p>
112 * This serializer provides several serialization options.
113 * Typically, one of the predefined <jsf>DEFAULT</jsf> serializers will be sufficient.
114 * However, custom serializers can be constructed to fine-tune behavior.
115 *
116 * <p>
117 * If an attribute name contains any non-valid XML element characters, they will be escaped using standard
118 * {@code _x####_} notation.
119 *
120 * <h5 class='topic'>Behavior-specific subclasses</h5>
121 * <p>
122 * The following direct subclasses are provided for convenience:
123 * <ul>
124 *    <li>{@link Sq} - Default serializer, single quotes.
125 *    <li>{@link SqReadable} - Default serializer, single quotes, whitespace added.
126 * </ul>
127 *
128 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
129 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
130 * </ul>
131 *
132 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
133 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/XmlSupport">XML Basics</a>
134
135 * </ul>
136 */
137@SuppressWarnings({
138   "java:S110", // Inheritance depth acceptable for this class hierarchy
139   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase naming convention
140   "resource" // Closeable resources are owned by the caller's serializer session; Eclipse JDT @Owning warning is by design.
141})
142public class XmlSerializer extends WriterSerializer implements XmlMetaProvider, RecordWritable {
143
144   // Property name constants
145   private static final String PROP_addBeanTypes = "addBeanTypes";
146   private static final String PROP_addNamespaceUrlsToRoot = "addNamespaceUrlsToRoot";
147   private static final String PROP_autoDetectNamespaces = "autoDetectNamespaces";
148   private static final String PROP_defaultNamespace = "defaultNamespace";
149   private static final String PROP_enableNamespaces = "enableNamespaces";
150   private static final String PROP_namespaces = "namespaces";
151
152   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
153   private static final String ARG_copyFrom = "copyFrom";
154   private static final String ARG_builder = "builder";
155   private static final String ARG_values = "values";
156
157   /**
158    * Builder class.
159    */
160   @SuppressWarnings({
161      "java:S119" // 'SELF' (CRTP self-type) is intentional and clearer than a single-letter name.
162   })
163   public abstract static class Builder<SELF extends Builder<SELF>> extends WriterSerializer.Builder<SELF> {
164
165      private static final Cache<HashKey,XmlSerializer> CACHE = Cache.of(HashKey.class, XmlSerializer.class).build();
166
167      private boolean addBeanTypesXml;
168      private boolean addNamespaceUrisToRoot;
169      private boolean disableAutoDetectNamespaces;
170      private boolean disableJsonTags;
171      private boolean enableNamespaces;
172      private Namespace defaultNamespace;
173      private List<Namespace> namespaces;
174      private String textNodeDelimiter;
175
176      /**
177       * Constructor, default settings.
178       */
179      protected Builder() {
180         produces("text/xml");
181         addBeanTypesXml = env("XmlSerializer.addBeanTypes", false);
182         addNamespaceUrisToRoot = env("XmlSerializer.addNamespaceUrisToRoot", false);
183         disableAutoDetectNamespaces = env("XmlSerializer.disableAutoDetectNamespaces", false);
184         disableJsonTags = env("XmlSerializer.disableJsonTags", false);
185         enableNamespaces = env("XmlSerializer.enableNamespaces", false);
186         defaultNamespace = null;
187         namespaces = null;
188         textNodeDelimiter = env("XmlSerializer.textNodeDelimiter", "");
189      }
190
191      /**
192       * Copy constructor.
193       *
194       * @param copyFrom The builder to copy from.
195       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
196       */
197      protected Builder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
198         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
199         addBeanTypesXml = copyFrom.addBeanTypesXml;
200         addNamespaceUrisToRoot = copyFrom.addNamespaceUrisToRoot;
201         defaultNamespace = copyFrom.defaultNamespace;
202         disableAutoDetectNamespaces = copyFrom.disableAutoDetectNamespaces;
203         disableJsonTags = copyFrom.disableJsonTags;
204         enableNamespaces = copyFrom.enableNamespaces;
205         namespaces = copyFrom.namespaces == null ? null : new ArrayList<>(copyFrom.namespaces);
206         textNodeDelimiter = copyFrom.textNodeDelimiter;
207      }
208
209      /**
210       * Copy constructor.
211       *
212       * @param copyFrom The bean to copy from.
213       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
214       */
215      protected Builder(XmlSerializer copyFrom) {
216         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
217         addBeanTypesXml = copyFrom.addBeanTypesXml;
218         addNamespaceUrisToRoot = copyFrom.addNamespaceUrlsToRoot;
219         defaultNamespace = copyFrom.getDefaultNamespace();
220         disableAutoDetectNamespaces = ! copyFrom.autoDetectNamespaces;
221         disableJsonTags = ! copyFrom.addJsonTags;
222         enableNamespaces = copyFrom.enableNamespaces;
223         var ctxNamespaces = copyFrom.getNamespaces();
224         namespaces = ctxNamespaces.isEmpty() ? null : new ArrayList<>(ctxNamespaces);
225         textNodeDelimiter = copyFrom.getTextNodeDelimiter();
226      }
227
228      /**
229       * Add <js>"_type"</js> properties when needed.
230       *
231       * <p>
232       * If <jk>true</jk>, then <js>"_type"</js> properties will be added to beans if their type cannot be inferred
233       * through reflection.
234       *
235       * <p>
236       * When present, this value overrides the {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.Serializer.Builder#addBeanTypes()} setting and is
237       * provided to customize the behavior of specific serializers in a {@link SerializerSet}.
238       *
239       * @return This object.
240       */
241      public SELF addBeanTypesXml() {
242         return addBeanTypesXml(true);
243      }
244
245      /**
246       * Same as {@link #addBeanTypesXml()} but allows you to explicitly specify the value.
247       *
248       * @param value The value for this setting.
249       * @return This object.
250       */
251      public SELF addBeanTypesXml(boolean value) {
252         addBeanTypesXml = value;
253         return self();
254      }
255
256      /**
257       * Add namespace URLs to the root element.
258       *
259       * <p>
260       * Use this setting to add {@code xmlns:x} attributes to the root element for the default and all mapped namespaces.
261       *
262       * <p>
263       * This setting is ignored if {@link #enableNamespaces()} is not enabled.
264       *
265       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
266       *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/XmlNamespaces">Namespaces</a>
267       * </ul>
268       *
269       * @return This object.
270       */
271      public SELF addNamespaceUrisToRoot() {
272         return addNamespaceUrisToRoot(true);
273      }
274
275      /**
276       * Same as {@link #addNamespaceUrisToRoot()} but allows you to explicitly specify the value.
277       *
278       * @param value The value for this setting.
279       * @return This object.
280       */
281      public SELF addNamespaceUrisToRoot(boolean value) {
282         addNamespaceUrisToRoot = value;
283         return self();
284      }
285
286      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
287      public XmlSerializer build() {
288         return cache(CACHE).build(XmlSerializer.class);
289      }
290
291      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
292      public abstract SELF copy();
293
294      /**
295       * Default namespace.
296       *
297       * <p>
298       * Specifies the default namespace URI for this document.
299       *
300       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
301       *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/XmlNamespaces">Namespaces</a>
302       * </ul>
303       *
304       * @param value
305       *    The new value for this property.
306       *    <br>The default is <js>"juneau: http://www.apache.org/2013/Juneau"</js>.
307       *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to specify no namespace.
308       * @return This object.
309       */
310      public SELF defaultNamespace(Namespace value) {
311         defaultNamespace = value;
312         return self();
313      }
314
315      /**
316       * Don't auto-detect namespace usage.
317       *
318       * <p>
319       * Don't detect namespace usage before serialization.
320       *
321       * <p>
322       * Used in conjunction with {@link Builder#addNamespaceUrisToRoot()} to reduce the list of namespace URLs appended to the
323       * root element to only those that will be used in the resulting document.
324       *
325       * <p>
326       * If disabled, then the data structure will first be crawled looking for namespaces that will be encountered before
327       * the root element is serialized.
328       *
329       * <p>
330       * This setting is ignored if {@link Builder#enableNamespaces()} is not enabled.
331       *
332       * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
333       *    <li class='note'>
334       *       Auto-detection of namespaces can be costly performance-wise.
335       *       <br>In high-performance environments, it's recommended that namespace detection be
336       *       disabled, and that namespaces be manually defined through the {@link Builder#namespaces(Namespace...)} property.
337       * </ul>
338       *
339       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
340       *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/XmlNamespaces">Namespaces</a>
341       * </ul>
342       *
343       * @return This object.
344       */
345      public SELF disableAutoDetectNamespaces() {
346         return disableAutoDetectNamespaces(true);
347      }
348
349      /**
350       * Same as {@link #disableAutoDetectNamespaces()} but allows you to explicitly specify the value.
351       *
352       * @param value The value for this setting.
353       * @return This object.
354       */
355      public SELF disableAutoDetectNamespaces(boolean value) {
356         disableAutoDetectNamespaces = value;
357         return self();
358      }
359
360      /**
361       * <i><l>XmlSerializer</l> configuration property:&emsp;</i>  Disable use of JSON type identifier tags.
362       *
363       * <p>
364       * When enabled, JSON type tags (e.g. <js>"&lt;string&gt;"</js>) tags and attributes will not be added to the output.
365       * Note that JSON type tags are used to ensure parsers are able to recreate the original data types passed
366       * into the serializer.  Disabling JSON tags can cause different data to be parsed (e.g. strings instead of numbers).
367       *
368       * @return This object.
369       */
370      public SELF disableJsonTags() {
371         return disableJsonTags(true);
372      }
373
374      /**
375       * Same as {@link #disableJsonTags()} but allows you to explicitly specify the value.
376       *
377       * @param value The value for this setting.
378       * @return This object.
379       */
380      public SELF disableJsonTags(boolean value) {
381         disableJsonTags = value;
382         return self();
383      }
384
385      /**
386       * Enable support for XML namespaces.
387       *
388       * <p>
389       * If not enabled, XML output will not contain any namespaces regardless of any other settings.
390       *
391       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
392       *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/XmlNamespaces">Namespaces</a>
393       * </ul>
394       *
395       * @return This object.
396       */
397      public SELF enableNamespaces() {
398         return enableNamespaces(true);
399      }
400
401      /**
402       * Same as {@link #enableNamespaces()} but allows you to explicitly specify the value.
403       *
404       * @param value The value for this setting.
405       * @return This object.
406       */
407      public SELF enableNamespaces(boolean value) {
408         enableNamespaces = value;
409         return self();
410      }
411
412      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
413      public HashKey hashKey() {
414         // @formatter:off
415         return HashKey.of(
416            super.hashKey(),
417            addBeanTypesXml,
418            addNamespaceUrisToRoot,
419            disableAutoDetectNamespaces,
420            disableJsonTags,
421            enableNamespaces,
422            defaultNamespace,
423            namespaces,
424            textNodeDelimiter
425         );
426         // @formatter:on
427      }
428
429      /**
430       * Default namespaces.
431       *
432       * <p>
433       * The default list of namespaces associated with this serializer.
434       *
435       * @param values The new value for this property.
436       *    <br>Cannot contain <jk>null</jk> values.
437       * @return This object.
438       */
439      public SELF namespaces(Namespace...values) {
440         assertArgNoNulls(ARG_values, values);
441         namespaces = addAll(namespaces, values);
442         return self();
443      }
444
445      /**
446       * Enable support for XML namespaces.
447       *
448       * <p>
449       * Shortcut for calling <code>enableNamespaces(<jk>true</jk>)</code>.
450       *
451       * @return This object.
452       */
453      public SELF ns() {
454         return enableNamespaces();
455      }
456
457      /**
458       * Text node delimiter.
459       *
460       * <p>
461       * Specifies the delimiter string to insert between consecutive text nodes.
462       * This is useful for adding spacing between text elements to improve readability.
463       *
464       * <p>
465       * The default value is an empty string (no delimiter).
466       *
467       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
468       * <p class='bjava'>
469       *    XmlSerializer.<jsm>create</jsm>()
470       *       .textNodeDelimiter(<js>" "</js>)
471       *       .build();
472       * </p>
473       *
474       * <p>
475       * With this setting, serializing:
476       * <p class='bjava'>
477       *    <jk>new</jk> Audio().children(<js>"a"</js>, <js>"b"</js>, <jk>new</jk> Strong(<js>"c"</js>));
478       * </p>
479       *
480       * <p>
481       * Will produce: <code>&lt;audio&gt;a b&lt;strong&gt;c&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/audio&gt;</code>
482       * <br>Instead of: <code>&lt;audio&gt;ab&lt;strong&gt;c&lt;/strong&gt;&lt;/audio&gt;</code>
483       *
484       * @param value
485       *    The delimiter string.
486       *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> (interpreted as empty string).
487       * @return This object.
488       */
489      public SELF textNodeDelimiter(String value) {
490         textNodeDelimiter = value == null ? "" : value;
491         return self();
492      }
493
494
495   }
496
497   /**
498    * Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed {@link XmlSerializer#create()} / {@link XmlSerializer#copy()} path.
499    */
500   public static final class DefaultBuilder extends Builder<DefaultBuilder> {
501
502      DefaultBuilder() {}
503
504      DefaultBuilder(XmlSerializer copyFrom) {
505         super(copyFrom);
506      }
507
508      DefaultBuilder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
509         super(copyFrom);
510      }
511
512      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
513      public DefaultBuilder copy() {
514         return new DefaultBuilder(this);
515      }
516   }
517
518   /** Default serializer without namespaces. */
519   public static class Ns extends XmlSerializer {
520
521      /**
522       * Constructor.
523       *
524       * @param builder The builder for this object.
525       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
526       */
527      public Ns(Builder<?> builder) {
528         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_builder, builder).enableNamespaces());
529      }
530   }
531
532   /** Default serializer without namespaces, single quotes. */
533   public static class NsSq extends XmlSerializer {
534
535      /**
536       * Constructor.
537       *
538       * @param builder The builder for this object.
539       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
540       */
541      public NsSq(Builder<?> builder) {
542         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_builder, builder).enableNamespaces().quoteChar('\''));
543      }
544   }
545
546   /** Default serializer without namespaces, single quotes, with whitespace. */
547   public static class NsSqReadable extends XmlSerializer {
548
549      /**
550       * Constructor.
551       *
552       * @param builder The builder for this object.
553       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
554       */
555      public NsSqReadable(Builder<?> builder) {
556         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_builder, builder).enableNamespaces().quoteChar('\'').useWhitespace());
557      }
558   }
559
560   /** Default serializer, single quotes. */
561   public static class Sq extends XmlSerializer {
562
563      /**
564       * Constructor.
565       *
566       * @param builder The builder for this object.
567       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
568       */
569      public Sq(Builder<?> builder) {
570         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_builder, builder).quoteChar('\''));
571      }
572   }
573
574   /** Default serializer, single quotes, whitespace added. */
575   public static class SqReadable extends XmlSerializer {
576
577      /**
578       * Constructor.
579       *
580       * @param builder The builder for this object.
581       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
582       */
583      public SqReadable(Builder<?> builder) {
584         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_builder, builder).quoteChar('\'').useWhitespace());
585      }
586   }
587
588
589   /** Default serializer without namespaces. */
590   public static final XmlSerializer DEFAULT = new XmlSerializer(create());
591   /** Default serializer without namespaces, with single quotes. */
592   public static final XmlSerializer DEFAULT_SQ = new Sq(create());
593
594   /** Default serializer without namespaces, with single quotes, whitespace added. */
595   public static final XmlSerializer DEFAULT_SQ_READABLE = new SqReadable(create());
596
597   /** Default serializer, all default settings. */
598   public static final XmlSerializer DEFAULT_NS = new Ns(create());
599
600   /** Default serializer, single quotes. */
601   public static final XmlSerializer DEFAULT_NS_SQ = new NsSq(create());
602
603   /** Default serializer, single quotes, whitespace added. */
604   public static final XmlSerializer DEFAULT_NS_SQ_READABLE = new NsSqReadable(create());
605
606   protected static final Namespace DEFAULT_JUNEAU_NAMESPACE = Namespace.of("juneau", "http://www.apache.org/2013/Juneau");
607   protected static final Namespace DEFAULT_XS_NAMESPACE = Namespace.of("xs", "http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema");
608
609   /**
610    * Creates a new builder for this object.
611    *
612    * @return A new builder.
613    */
614   @SuppressWarnings({
615      "java:S1452" // Builder<?> wildcard return intentional; callers chain via fluent API without needing the concrete type
616   })
617   public static Builder<?> create() {
618      return new DefaultBuilder();
619   }
620
621   protected final boolean addBeanTypesXml;
622   protected final boolean addJsonTags;
623   protected final boolean addNamespaceUrlsToRoot;
624   protected final boolean autoDetectNamespaces;
625   protected final boolean enableNamespaces;
626   private final Namespace defaultNamespace;
627   private final List<Namespace> namespaces;
628   private final String textNodeDelimiter;
629
630   private final boolean addBeanTypes2;
631   private final Map<ClassMeta<?>,XmlClassMeta> xmlClassMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
632   private final Map<BeanMeta<?>,XmlBeanMeta> xmlBeanMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
633   private final Map<BeanPropertyMeta,XmlBeanPropertyMeta> xmlBeanPropertyMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
634
635   /**
636    * Constructor.
637    *
638    * @param builder
639    *    The builder for this object.
640    */
641   public XmlSerializer(Builder<?> builder) {
642      super(builder);
643      addBeanTypesXml = builder.addBeanTypesXml;
644      addJsonTags = ! builder.disableJsonTags;
645      addNamespaceUrlsToRoot = builder.addNamespaceUrisToRoot;
646      autoDetectNamespaces = ! builder.disableAutoDetectNamespaces;
647      defaultNamespace = nn(builder.defaultNamespace) ? builder.defaultNamespace : DEFAULT_JUNEAU_NAMESPACE;
648      enableNamespaces = builder.enableNamespaces;
649      namespaces = u(nn(builder.namespaces) ? new ArrayList<>(builder.namespaces) : new ArrayList<>());
650      textNodeDelimiter = builder.textNodeDelimiter;
651      addBeanTypes2 = addBeanTypesXml || super.isAddBeanTypes();
652   }
653
654   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
655   public Builder<?> copy() {
656      return new DefaultBuilder(this);
657   }
658
659   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
660   public XmlSerializerSession.Builder<?> createSession() {
661      return XmlSerializerSession.create(this);
662   }
663
664   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
665   public XmlSerializerSession getSession() { return createSession().build(); }
666
667   /**
668    * Convenience delegator for the whole-value {@link RecordWriter} using <b>default session
669    * arguments</b>.  The real implementation lives on
670    * {@link XmlSerializerSession#serializeRecords(Object)}.
671    *
672    * @param output The output.
673    * @return A new {@link RecordWriter}.
674    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying output.
675    */
676   @Override /* RecordWritable */
677   public RecordWriter serializeRecords(Object output) throws IOException {
678      return getSession().serializeRecords(output);
679   }
680
681   /**
682    * The XML record writer is buffered/{@link RecordAdapter}-backed, not O(1) streaming.
683    *
684    * @return Always <jk>false</jk>.
685    */
686   @Override /* RecordWritable */
687   public boolean isRecordStreaming() { return false; }
688
689   @Override /* Overridden from XmlMetaProvider */
690   public XmlBeanMeta getXmlBeanMeta(BeanMeta<?> bm) {
691      return xmlBeanMetas.computeIfAbsent(bm, k -> new XmlBeanMeta(k, this));
692   }
693
694   @Override /* Overridden from XmlMetaProvider */
695   public XmlBeanPropertyMeta getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
696      return xmlBeanPropertyMetas.computeIfAbsent(bpm, k -> new XmlBeanPropertyMeta(k.getDelegateFor(), this));
697   }
698
699   @Override /* Overridden from XmlMetaProvider */
700   public XmlClassMeta getXmlClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
701      return xmlClassMetas.computeIfAbsent(cm, k -> new XmlClassMeta(k, this));
702   }
703
704   /**
705    * Default namespace.
706    *
707    * @see Builder#defaultNamespace(Namespace)
708    * @return
709    *    The default namespace URI for this document.
710    */
711   protected final Namespace getDefaultNamespace() { return defaultNamespace; }
712
713   /**
714    * Default namespaces.
715    *
716    * @see Builder#namespaces(Namespace...)
717    * @return
718    *    The default list of namespaces associated with this serializer.
719    *    <br>Never <jk>null</jk>.
720    *    <br>List is unmodifiable.
721    */
722   protected final List<Namespace> getNamespaces() { return namespaces; }
723
724   /**
725    * Text node delimiter.
726    *
727    * @see Builder#textNodeDelimiter(String)
728    * @return
729    *    The delimiter string to insert between consecutive text nodes.
730    *    <br>Never <jk>null</jk>.
731    */
732   protected final String getTextNodeDelimiter() { return textNodeDelimiter; }
733
734   /**
735    * Add <js>"_type"</js> properties when needed.
736    *
737    * @see Builder#addBeanTypesXml()
738    * @return
739    *    <jk>true</jk> if<js>"_type"</js> properties will be added to beans if their type cannot be inferred
740    *    through reflection.
741    */
742   @Override
743   protected boolean isAddBeanTypes() { return addBeanTypes2; }
744
745   /**
746    * Add namespace URLs to the root element.
747    *
748    * @see Builder#addNamespaceUrisToRoot()
749    * @return
750    *    <jk>true</jk> if {@code xmlns:x} attributes are added to the root element for the default and all mapped namespaces.
751    */
752   protected final boolean isAddNamespaceUrlsToRoot() { return addNamespaceUrlsToRoot; }
753
754   /**
755    * Auto-detect namespace usage.
756    *
757    * @see Builder#disableAutoDetectNamespaces()
758    * @return
759    *    <jk>true</jk> if namespace usage is detected before serialization.
760    */
761   protected final boolean isAutoDetectNamespaces() { return autoDetectNamespaces; }
762
763   /**
764    * Enable support for XML namespaces.
765    *
766    * @see Builder#enableNamespaces()
767    * @return
768    *    <jk>false</jk> if XML output will not contain any namespaces regardless of any other settings.
769    */
770   protected final boolean isEnableNamespaces() { return enableNamespaces; }
771
772   @Override /* Overridden from WriterSerializer */
773   protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
774      return super.properties()
775         .a(PROP_addBeanTypes, addBeanTypes2)
776         .a(PROP_addNamespaceUrlsToRoot, addNamespaceUrlsToRoot)
777         .a(PROP_autoDetectNamespaces, autoDetectNamespaces)
778         .a(PROP_defaultNamespace, defaultNamespace)
779         .a(PROP_enableNamespaces, enableNamespaces)
780         .a(PROP_namespaces, namespaces);
781   }
782}
